channel.title: Models on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Models on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: ai: A Developer’s Guide to Managing Models, Cost and Quality in Microsoft Foundry
item.description:
Microsoft describes a model lifecycle for Foundry focused on selecting models, evaluating quality, controlling cost, operating safely, and iterating as production needs evolve. The post is a high-level guide rather than a product changelog.

  • Source: Microsoft AI Foundry Blog

item.title: security: Microsoft Build 2026: Securing code, agents, and models across the development lifecycle
item.description:
Microsoft says Build 2026 introduced MDASH and additional security capabilities aimed at securing code, agents, and models across the development lifecycle. The post frames these updates as support for fast AI development with security controls built in.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog

item.title: github: Gemini models in Copilot CLI, cloud agent, and the Copilot app
item.description:
GitHub added Gemini 3.1 Pro (Preview) and Gemini 3.5 Flash to more Copilot surfaces. The models are now available in Copilot CLI, Copilot cloud agent, and the GitHub Copilot app.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Updates to available models in Copilot on web
item.description:
GitHub updated the model selection available for Copilot Chat on the web to improve consistency and response quality. The post says model choice is being limited, but the provided excerpt does not include the full list of changes.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Copilot cloud agent: Fast, cost-efficient models for simple tasks
item.description:
GitHub Copilot cloud agent now supports additional models, letting users choose fast, cost-efficient options for simpler tasks. The change expands the set of models available when delegating work to the cloud agent.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Grok Code Fast 1 deprecated
item.description:
GitHub deprecated Grok Code Fast 1 across all GitHub Copilot experiences on May 15, 2026. The deprecation applies to Copilot Chat, inline edits, ask and agent modes, and code completions.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Copilot Student GPT-5.3-Codex removal from model picker
item.description:
GitHub is removing GPT-5.3-Codex from the Copilot Student plan’s model picker starting today. The model is still available when using auto model selection.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: ai: What’s new in Microsoft Foundry | March 2026
item.description:
March 2026 Foundry updates include Agent Service GA with private networking, new GPT-5.4 and GPT-5.4 Mini models, Priority Processing, Phi-4 Reasoning Vision, SDK 2.0 GA across major languages, additional Fireworks AI and NVIDIA Nemotron models, and third-party guardrails from Palo Alto and Zenity.

  • Source: Microsoft AI Foundry Blog
